name: napi-oop-e2e
description: Cross-process E2E tests: build the fixture provider, codegen its bindings, compile TS, then assert real two-process behaviour.

scripts.build:native: cargo build --release -p napi-oop-e2e-fixture -p napi-oop-e2e-provider && node stage-inproc.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build:native && npm run build:types && npm run build:ts
